title: Silicone Air Fryer Liners 2 Pack for Ninja Dual Zone AF400UK AF451UK AF300UK 8–9.5L Foodi MAX, Compatible with Tower T17088, Keplin, EMtronics Reusable Non-Stick Dishwasher Safe Accessories
features: 【Compatible With 8.5L-9.5L Large Dual Air Fryers】 Measuring 21cm x 14cm x 7cm, these silicone liners are a perfect fit for Ninja Foodi MAX Dual Zone Digital Air Fryers (AF400UK/AF400UKCP/AF451UK 9.5L), Ninja Double Stack XL Air Fryers (SL400UK/SL400UKCP 9.5L), Tower T17088/T17100 (9L), Keplin 9L Dual Zone Air Fryer, Emtronics Dual Air Fryer (9L), Instant Vortex Plus Versa (8.5L), and many more.

【Reusable & Budget-Friendly】Made from safe, food-grade silicone, these liners can handle temperatures up to 4°F 428°F/220°C. They're sturdy, durable, and won't tear or burn, making them a cost-effective alternative to disposable parchment paper or additional air fryer pans.

【Easy to Clean & Dishwasher Safe】Soft and flexible, these accessories for AF400UK/AF451UK are a breeze to clean. Just flip them inside out and rinse with warm water or toss them in the dishwasher—no more scrubbing by hand.

【Unique Grease Guide Design】With raised textures, these liners keep grease off your food and improve air circulation for even cooking. They’re ideal for crispy results with fries, chicken, and more. Handy top handles make lifting and removing effortless.

【Versatile & Practical】Compatible with air fryers, microwaves, ovens, steamers, and stovetops, these reusable liners are perfect for baking, roasting, frying, or even serving food. Great for home baking, camping, barbecues, and summer parties—truly a versatile kitchen companion!
